title: Portfolio ESG Summary
description: Data schema for the portfolio-summary report template. Used by scope3-accounting skill for GRESB, LP, and board-level carbon summary reporting.

name.description: Portfolio or fund display name, e.g. 'Meridian Green Core Fund III'

fund_name.description: Formal legal fund name if different from portfolio.name

total_assets.description: Number of assets in the portfolio

total_gfa_sqft.description: Total gross floor area across all assets, in square feet

total_aum_usd.description: Total assets under management, in USD

reporting_year.description: Calendar year this report covers, e.g. 2024

jurisdiction_mix.description: Geographic composition of the portfolio by percentage.

country.description: Country or region name, e.g. 'United States'

pct.description: Percentage of portfolio GFA in this jurisdiction, 0-100

emissions_summary.description: Portfolio-level Scope 1/2/3 emissions totals and coverage metadata.

total_scope1_tco2e.description: Total Scope 1 emissions across all assets, in tCO2e

total_scope2_tco2e.description: Total Scope 2 emissions across all assets, in tCO2e (market-based preferred)

total_scope3_tco2e.description: Total Scope 3 emissions (tenant, embodied, etc.) in tCO2e. Null if not reported.

yoy_change_pct.description: Year-over-year change in portfolio intensity, in percentage points (negative = improvement). Null if prior year not available.

data_coverage_pct.description: Percentage of portfolio GFA with measured (not estimated) energy data

verification_status.description: Third-party assurance status of emissions data

assets.description: Individual asset-level summary records. Sort order: highest emitters first (descending scope1+scope2).

gfa_sqft.description: Gross floor area in square feet

scope1.description: Scope 1 emissions for this asset in tCO2e

scope2.description: Scope 2 emissions for this asset in tCO2e

eui_kwh_m2.description: Energy Use Intensity in kWh/m²/yr. Null if not available.

crrem_status.description: CRREM pathway alignment status. 'aligned' = on track; 'at-risk' = within 20% above pathway; 'stranded' = >20% above pathway.

bps_exposure.description: Exposure to Building Performance Standards fine risk in the reporting year

data_quality.description: Data quality score 1-5. 5 = verified metered data; 1 = rough estimate only.

targets.description: Portfolio decarbonization targets and progress tracking.

baseline_year.description: Baseline year for reduction target calculations, e.g. 2019

baseline_intensity.description: Portfolio intensity in baseline year, kgCO2e/m²/yr

target_2030_pct_reduction.description: Target percentage reduction in intensity by 2030 vs. baseline, e.g. 50 = 50% reduction

target_2050_net_zero.description: Whether the portfolio has a formal 2050 net-zero commitment

current_progress_pct.description: Percentage of the 2030 reduction target achieved to date, e.g. 38 = 38% of the way to the 2030 target. May exceed 100 if target already met.

initiatives.description: Portfolio-level carbon reduction initiatives (planned, in-progress, or complete).

name.description: Initiative name, e.g. 'LED Lighting Portfolio Rollout'

assets_covered.description: Number of assets this initiative applies to

projected_reduction_tco2e.description: Projected annual carbon reduction when fully implemented, in tCO2e

capex_total_usd.description: Total capital expenditure for this initiative across all assets, in USD

gresb_context.description: GRESB benchmark data. Optional — include only when a GRESB submission exists for this reporting year.

peer_average.description: Peer group average GRESB score for comparison

prepared_by.description: Name of person, team, or tool that prepared this report, e.g. 'Audette Sustainability Intelligence'

prepared_for.description: Recipient of this report, e.g. 'LP Quarterly ESG Reporting — Q4 2024'

report_date.description: Report generation date in YYYY-MM-DD format
